title: SAENA telemetry attribute registry (v1)
description: Machine-validated schema for packages/observability/registry/attributes.yaml (and its JSON mirror, attributes.json). Defines the SAENA custom telemetry attribute namespace per ADR-0016, aligned to the 3-context envelope model (ADR-0013). Each entry describes one saena.* attribute: its type, cardinality, PII status, and per-context (tenant|system|aggregate) requirement rule.

name.description: Fully-qualified saena.* attribute name. Identifiers (run_id/tenant_id/etc.) must never appear in span/metric names — attribute-only per ADR-0016.

cardinality.description: Expected distinct-value cardinality. Attributes used in span/metric names must be low.

pii.description: Whether the attribute value itself is (or may contain) personally identifiable / re-identifying information. Note: an attribute may be pii=false yet still be tenant-identifying (see description field for such cases) — pii tracks direct PII content, not identifiability.

description.description: Human-readable purpose, source-of-truth cross-reference, and any context-specific notes (e.g. OPEN decisions, identifying-but-not-PII caveats).

contextRule.description: Requirement rule for this attribute within the named context_type (tenant|system|aggregate), derived from the event envelope discriminator (ADR-0013).
